corporateExecutivePrompt: Full body shot, professional 35-year-old business executive, tailored navy suit, confident posture, modern office background, natural lighting, 8K resolution, photorealistic
techEntrepreneurPrompt: Head to toe portrait, 28-year-old tech entrepreneur, casual smart attire, standing confidently, minimalist studio background, soft lighting, ultra HD, professional photography
fashionModelPrompt: Full body shot, stunning 25-year-old fashion model, 5'7" tall, athletic build, long flowing hair, elegant white maxi dress and heels, confident pose, neutral studio background, professional fashion photography, 8K resolution, photorealistic
fitnessInfluencerPrompt: Complete figure, fit 30-year-old fitness coach, athletic sportswear, dynamic standing pose, gym environment, energetic expression, professional sports photography, high resolution
artistCreatorPrompt: Full length portrait, creative 27-year-old artist, bohemian style clothing, relaxed pose, artistic studio setting, natural window light, cinematic quality, 8K photorealistic
contentCreatorPrompt: Head to toe, young content creator, trendy casual outfit, confident standing pose, modern minimalist background, ring light setup, social media ready, ultra HD quality
proTipsDesc:
• Include "Full body shot" or "Head to toe" for complete figure
• Specify age, build, height for accurate generation
• Describe clothing, pose, and background details
• Add "8K resolution, photorealistic" for quality
• Mention lighting: "studio lighting", "natural light", etc.

faq1Question: How do I generate a product video?
faq1Answer: Navigate to the Product Videos section, select a model and upload your product photo. Fill in the prompt describing the scene and click Generate. The process usually takes 1–3 minutes.
faq2Question: Why is my video stuck on 'Processing'?
faq2Answer: Video generation can take up to 5 minutes depending on server load. If it stays in processing for more than 10 minutes, please contact support with your video ID.
faq3Question: Can I download my generated videos?
faq3Answer: Yes! Open any completed video and click the download icon in the bottom-right corner of the video player.
faq4Answer: We currently support 9:16 (portrait/reels) and 16:9 (landscape/widescreen) formats. More formats are coming soon.
faq5Question: How do I add a new model?
faq5Answer: Go to the Models section and click 'Add Model'. Upload a clear front-facing photo and fill in the model details. The model will be available for video generation immediately.
faq6Answer: All uploaded media is stored securely and is only accessible to your account. We never share your content with third parties.

footerTagline: Empowering creators with AI-powered content tools.
heroSubheadline: Generate hyperreal motion, sound, and captions from a single prompt. No editing skills needed — just your idea.
wtw_description: Train a custom AI model on your brand. Then let it wear, hold, and showcase your products — in any scene, any style, any world you imagine.
wtw_promptPill: Show my product in a luxury setting
rc_description: Generate viral dance reels, trending content, and social-ready videos — powered by your own AI influencer. Built for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.
rc_feature4: ⚡  From prompt to post in seconds
pricing_subheadline: Start free, scale when ready. No hidden fees — just credits that power your AI content.
pricing_footerNote: All plans include access to the AI studio. Credits are valid for the full plan duration.
cya_description: Design a fully custom AI persona — your face, your style, your identity. Then deploy it across videos, reels, campaigns, and product shoots. No camera. No crew.
test_subheadline: Real people, real results. See what creators and brands are saying about their experience.
test_t1Text: This platform completely changed how I create content. The AI models are incredibly realistic and save me hours every week.
test_t2Text: We scaled our brand content 10x without hiring a single extra person. The quality blew our entire team away on day one.
test_t3Text: I was skeptical at first but the results speak for themselves. Our engagement went up 3x within the first month of using it.
test_t4Text: Running a creative agency means tight deadlines. This tool lets us deliver premium AI content at a pace we never thought possible.
test_t5Text: Product shoots used to cost us thousands. Now we generate stunning visuals in minutes. It pays for itself every single month.
test_t6Text: Managing multiple talent accounts is complex. This platform simplified everything — content, scheduling, and AI persona creation.
